ledger.zh: 短周期反转：过度反应后价格回吐
ledger.en: short-horizon reversal: overreaction mean-reverts

ledger.zh: 短周期反转：过度反应后价格回吐
ledger.en: short-horizon reversal: overreaction mean-reverts

ledger.zh: 短周期反转：过度反应后价格回吐
ledger.en: short-horizon reversal: overreaction mean-reverts

ledger.zh: 短周期反转：过度反应后价格回吐
ledger.en: short-horizon reversal: overreaction mean-reverts

ledger.zh: 中长周期动量：趋势延续
ledger.en: medium/long-horizon momentum: trend continuation

ledger.zh: 中长周期动量：趋势延续
ledger.en: medium/long-horizon momentum: trend continuation

ledger.zh: 中长周期动量：趋势延续
ledger.en: medium/long-horizon momentum: trend continuation

ledger.zh: 动量期限利差：长动量减短动量，捕捉加速/减速
ledger.en: momentum term spread: long minus short momentum captures accel/decel

ledger.zh: 风险调整反转：反转信号除以短期波动率（类夏普）
ledger.en: risk-adjusted reversal: reversal scaled by short-horizon vol (Sharpe-like)

ledger.zh: 反转一致性：窗口内下跌天数占比
ledger.en: reversal consistency: fraction of down-days in window

ledger.zh: 隔夜跳空：隔夜收益的动量分量
ledger.en: overnight gap: the overnight-return momentum component

ledger.zh: 日内收益：日内部分的反转分量
ledger.en: intraday return: the intraday-segment reversal component

ledger.zh: 收盘相对VWAP压力：收盘价偏离日内均价
ledger.en: close-vs-VWAP pressure: close deviation from intraday average price

ledger.zh: 开盘相对VWAP缺口
ledger.en: open-vs-VWAP gap

ledger.zh: VWAP偏离的动量：close-vwap缺口的5日变化
ledger.en: VWAP-deviation momentum: 5-day change of the close-vwap gap

ledger.zh: 隔夜/日内背离：两类收益滚动均值之差
ledger.en: overnight/intraday divergence: rolling-mean gap between the two return legs

ledger.zh: 价格加速度：收益的一阶差分
ledger.en: price acceleration: first difference of daily return

ledger.zh: 特质反转：剔除60日滚动市场beta后的残差反转
ledger.en: idiosyncratic reversal: reversal net of a 60-day rolling market beta

ledger.zh: 特质反转(共同分解)：5个价格标记同期变动的共同分量之外的close残差
ledger.en: idiosyncratic reversal (common/idio split): close move net of the 5-mark common component

ledger.zh: 组内反转：反转信号在行业g内部重新排名而非全市场
ledger.en: within-group reversal: rank the reversal signal inside industry g, not the whole market

ledger.zh: 正交动量：动量对x_0..x_7反转簇做截面回归后的残差
ledger.en: orthogonalized momentum: momentum residualized against the x_0..x_7 reversal cluster

ledger.zh: 非对称贝塔反转：下跌市场beta高于上涨市场beta的名字更容易反转
ledger.en: asymmetric-beta reversal: names with higher down-market than up-market beta revert more

ledger.zh: 日内区间：High-Low波动幅度
ledger.en: intraday range: high-low swing amplitude

ledger.zh: 相对区间：区间幅度相对价格水平归一
ledger.en: relative range: range normalised by the price level

ledger.zh: 收盘位置值：收盘价在日内区间中的位置(类%K)
ledger.en: close location value: close's position inside the day's range (Stochastic %K-like)

ledger.zh: Parkinson波动率：基于区间平方的已实现波动率代理
ledger.en: Parkinson volatility: realised-vol proxy from squared range

ledger.zh: 收益偏度：20日滚动偏度，彩票/尾部偏好折价
ledger.en: return skew: 20-day rolling skew, lottery/tail-preference discount

ledger.zh: 收益峰度：20日滚动峰度，尾部风险
ledger.en: return kurtosis: 20-day rolling kurtosis, tail risk

ledger.zh: 下行波动率：仅用下跌日计算的波动
ledger.en: downside volatility: vol computed only from down-days

ledger.zh: 上行波动率：仅用上涨日计算的波动
ledger.en: upside volatility: vol computed only from up-days

ledger.zh: 波动的波动：短期波动率自身的20日波动
ledger.en: vol-of-vol: the 20-day volatility of the 10-day realised vol

ledger.zh: MAX效应：窗口内最大单日区间，彩票股折价
ledger.en: MAX effect: the largest single-day range in the window, lottery discount

ledger.zh: 最差收益：窗口内最差单日收益
ledger.en: worst return: the worst single-day return in the window

ledger.zh: 最佳收益：窗口内最佳单日收益
ledger.en: best return: the best single-day return in the window

ledger.zh: 相对ATR：平均真实波幅相对价格水平
ledger.en: relative ATR: average true range normalised by price level

ledger.zh: 区间偏度：日内区间的滚动偏度
ledger.en: range skew: rolling skew of the intraday range

ledger.zh: 波动率制度：短窗区间/长窗区间，布林带收窄-放宽
ledger.en: volatility regime: short/long range ratio, Bollinger squeeze-vs-expansion

ledger.zh: 跳跃频率：窗口内|收益|超过2倍波动率的天数占比
ledger.en: jump frequency: share of days with |return| > 2x rolling vol

ledger.zh: 震荡指数：收益符号翻转频率，趋势vs噪声
ledger.en: choppiness index: sign-flip frequency of returns, trend vs noise

ledger.zh: 考夫曼效率比：净移动/累计绝对移动，趋势效率
ledger.en: Kaufman efficiency ratio: net move / cumulative absolute move, trend efficiency

ledger.zh: 已实现波动率期限利差：短窗-长窗波动率
ledger.en: realised-vol term spread: short-window minus long-window vol

ledger.zh: 多标记分歧度：5个价格标记5日动量的截面(同标的内)离散度
ledger.en: multi-mark divergence: dispersion across the 5 marks' own 5-day momenta

ledger.zh: Chaikin波动率：区间均值的10日变化率
ledger.en: Chaikin volatility: 10-day rate of change of the mean range

ledger.zh: Hawkes强度代理：收益平方的EWMA，刻画波动的自激聚集
ledger.en: Hawkes-intensity proxy: EWMA of squared returns, self-exciting vol clustering

ledger.zh: 成交量动量：成交量的一阶变化
ledger.en: volume momentum: first difference of volume

ledger.zh: 成交量异动：相对20日均量的偏离
ledger.en: volume shock: deviation from the 20-day average volume

ledger.zh: 成交量加速度：量变化的二阶差分
ledger.en: volume acceleration: second difference of volume

ledger.zh: 成交量稳定性：20日变异系数
ledger.en: volume stability: 20-day coefficient of variation

ledger.zh: 换手持续性：成交量EWMA平滑
ledger.en: turnover persistence: EWMA-smoothed volume

ledger.zh: 量价相关：收益与成交量变化的20日滚动相关
ledger.en: volume-price correlation: 20-day rolling corr of return and volume change

ledger.zh: 量冲击持续性：成交量的1阶自相关(20日窗)
ledger.en: volume-shock persistence: 20-day rolling AC(1) of volume

ledger.zh: OBV趋势：累计带符号成交量的10日动量
ledger.en: OBV trend: 10-day momentum of cumulative signed volume

ledger.zh: 资金流指标：Chaikin式量价加权流(10日滚动和)
ledger.en: money flow index: Chaikin-style volume-weighted flow (10-day rolling sum)

ledger.zh: 成交量排名动量：截面成交量排名的5日变化
ledger.en: volume-rank momentum: 5-day change in the cross-sectional volume rank

ledger.zh: 量-波关系：成交量与|收益|的20日滚动相关
ledger.en: volume-volatility relation: 20-day rolling corr of volume and |return|

ledger.zh: 换手极端度：成交量截面z分数的绝对值(关注度冲击)
ledger.en: turnover extremeness: |cross-sectional z-score| of volume (attention shock)

ledger.zh: 流动性择时：成交量与|收益|乘积的10日均值
ledger.en: liquidity timing: 10-day mean of volume times |return|

ledger.zh: 跳空幅度趋势：隔夜跳空绝对值的10日均值，事件代理
ledger.en: gap-size trend: 10-day mean of |overnight gap|, an event/news proxy

ledger.zh: 量价趋势指标(VPT)：收益率加权成交量的10日累计
ledger.en: volume-price trend (VPT): 10-day cumulative return-weighted volume

ledger.zh: VPIN代理：|带符号成交量|占总成交量比例，订单流毒性
ledger.en: VPIN proxy: |signed volume| share of total volume, order-flow toxicity

ledger.zh: 流动性复合背离：成交量排名与非流动性排名之差
ledger.en: liquidity composite divergence: volume rank minus illiquidity rank

ledger.zh: 市场贝塔：60日滚动回归到截面平均收益的系数
ledger.en: market beta: 60-day rolling regression coefficient on the cross-sectional mean return

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 特质波动率：剔除市场beta后残差的60日波动
ledger.en: idiosyncratic volatility: 60-day vol of the beta-residual return

ledger.zh: 协偏度：收益与市场收益平方的60日滚动相关
ledger.en: coskewness: 60-day rolling corr of return with squared market return

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 行业相对成交量：成交量减去(day,g)组内均值
ledger.en: group-relative volume: volume minus its (day,g) group mean

ledger.zh: 行业相对波动率：20日波动率减去(day,g)组内均值
ledger.en: group-relative volatility: 20-day vol minus its (day,g) group mean

ledger.zh: 组内外强弱背离：全市场动量排名减去组内动量排名
ledger.en: cross-group relative strength: market-wide momentum rank minus within-group rank

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 距最高点天数：60日窗口内最近新高以来的天数
ledger.en: days since high: days elapsed since the most recent 60-day high

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 距最低点距离：收盘价相对60日最低价的比例
ledger.en: distance from low: close relative to the 60-day low

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 均线交叉：10日均线减40日均线
ledger.en: moving-average cross: 10-day MA minus 40-day MA

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 趋势斜率：20日窗口内收盘价对时间的回归斜率
ledger.en: trend slope: 20-day rolling regression slope of close on time

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 布林带位置：收盘价偏离20日均线除以20日标准差
ledger.en: Bollinger position: close deviation from its 20-day MA over 20-day std

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: RSI式相对强弱：14日上涨幅度占总幅度比例
ledger.en: RSI-like relative strength: 14-day up-move share of total move

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 胜率：窗口内上涨天数占比
ledger.en: win rate: share of up-days in the window

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 收益自相关：20日窗口内一阶自相关
ledger.en: return autocorrelation: 20-day rolling AC(1)

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 趋势拟合优度：线性趋势解释的价格方差占比
ledger.en: trend goodness-of-fit: share of price variance explained by a linear trend

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: VWAP效率：|收盘-VWAP|相对日内区间
ledger.en: VWAP efficiency: |close-vwap| relative to the day's range

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 多标记共同趋势：5个价格标记5日动量的均值(共同分量)
ledger.en: multi-mark common trend: the mean of the 5 marks' own 5-day momenta (common component)

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 盘口压力代理：收盘价相对(prc3,prc4)中点的位置
ledger.en: book-pressure proxy: close's position relative to the (prc3,prc4) midpoint

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 标记价差趋势：5个标记的截面标准差的5减20日均值差
ledger.en: mark-spread trend: 5-vs-20-day change in the cross-mark std

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 价格捕获效率：|净收益|相对日内区间
ledger.en: tick efficiency: |net return| relative to the day's range

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 区间不对称性：上方空间减下方空间
ledger.en: range asymmetry: upside room minus downside room around the close

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: Kyle's lambda：|收益|对成交量的60日滚动回归斜率
ledger.en: Kyle's lambda: 60-day rolling regression slope of |return| on volume

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 冲击衰减：当日收益减去其3日EWMA(暂时性冲击分量)
ledger.en: impact decay: today's return minus its 3-day EWMA (the transient-impact component)

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 永久冲击代理：收益的20日EWMA(持续性分量)
ledger.en: permanent-impact proxy: the 20-day EWMA of return (the persistent component)

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 反转不对称性：下跌日反转力度减上涨日反转力度
ledger.en: reversal asymmetry: down-day reversion strength minus up-day reversion strength

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: Amihud非流动性：|收益|/成交量
ledger.en: Amihud illiquidity: |return| / volume

ledger.zh: 非流动性趋势：Amihud指标的10日均值
ledger.en: illiquidity trend: 10-day mean of the Amihud measure

ledger.zh: 带符号非流动性：符号(收益)乘以非流动性
ledger.en: signed illiquidity: sign(return) times illiquidity

ledger.zh: 非流动性动量：Amihud指标的10日变化
ledger.en: illiquidity momentum: 10-day change in the Amihud measure

ledger.zh: 流动性调整区间：日内区间除以成交量
ledger.en: liquidity-adjusted range: intraday range divided by volume

ledger.zh: 价格-成交量弹性：|收益|相对|成交量变化|(类价格冲击)
ledger.en: price-volume elasticity: |return| relative to |volume change| (a price-impact proxy)

ledger.zh: 跳空回补：隔夜跳空方向乘以当日日内收益
ledger.en: gap fade: overnight-gap sign times same-day intraday return

ledger.zh: 订单流失衡代理：收益符号乘以成交量(方向x强度分解)
ledger.en: OFI-lite: sign(return) times volume (sign x intensity decomposition)

ledger.zh: 成交量加权反转：反转信号乘以成交量截面排名(高关注度更易反转)
ledger.en: volume-weighted reversal: reversal scaled by the cross-sectional volume rank

ledger.zh: 非流动性x动量：非流动性溢价集中在低流动性名字上的条件化动量
ledger.en: illiquidity x momentum: momentum conditioned on the illiquidity level

ledger.zh: 波动率制度反转：反转信号乘以波动率截面排名
ledger.en: vol-regime reversal: reversal scaled by the cross-sectional volatility rank

ledger.zh: 流动性制度动量：动量信号乘以成交量截面排名
ledger.en: liquidity-regime momentum: momentum scaled by the cross-sectional volume rank

ledger.zh: 量价背离：价格上涨但成交量走弱的背离信号
ledger.en: price-volume divergence: price rising while volume is fading

ledger.zh: 毒性折价动量：用VPIN代理对动量信号做毒性折价
ledger.en: toxicity-discounted momentum: momentum discounted by the VPIN-proxy toxicity

ledger.zh: 方向x强度分解：动量方向乘以波动率排名(置信度)
ledger.en: sign x intensity decomposition: momentum direction times a volatility-rank confidence weight

ledger.zh: 流动性分层反转：反转信号乘以x_60换手代理排名
ledger.en: liquidity-tier reversal: reversal scaled by the x_60 turnover-proxy rank

ledger.zh: 区间扩张突破：当日区间显著超过20日均值的突破信号
ledger.en: range-expansion breakout: today's range materially exceeding its 20-day mean

ledger.zh: 开-收-VWAP三角：开盘与收盘相对VWAP偏离的乘积(共振/背离)
ledger.en: open-close-VWAP triangle: product of open's and close's deviations from VWAP

ledger.zh: 非流动性x波动率制度：两类风险排名的协同
ledger.en: illiquidity x vol-regime: co-movement of the two cross-sectional risk ranks

ledger.zh: 反转x贝塔：反转信号乘以市场贝塔排名(高贝塔名字反转特性不同)
ledger.en: reversal x beta: reversal scaled by the cross-sectional market-beta rank

ledger.zh: VWAP回归速度：收盘-VWAP压力的1阶自相关，压力持续性
ledger.en: VWAP-reversion speed: AC(1) of the close-vwap pressure, its persistence

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 贝塔动量：60日市场贝塔自身的20日变化
ledger.en: beta momentum: 20-day change in the 60-day rolling market beta

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 隔夜贝塔：隔夜收益对截面平均隔夜收益的60日回归系数
ledger.en: overnight beta: 60-day rolling regression of overnight return on the cross-sectional mean overnight return

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 区间/跳空比：日内区间相对隔夜跳空幅度，日内vs隔夜信息占比
ledger.en: range-to-gap ratio: intraday range relative to overnight-gap size, intraday vs overnight information share

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 隔夜漂移持续性：隔夜跳空方向的5日平滑，是否持续同向
ledger.en: overnight-drift persistence: 5-day smoothed overnight gap, whether the drift persists

ledger.zh: 跨标记领先-滞后：昨日收盘变动对今日开盘跳空的20日滚动相关
ledger.en: cross-mark lead-lag: 20-day rolling corr of yesterday's close move with today's overnight gap

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 波动聚集性：收益平方的1阶自相关(ARCH效应)，20日窗
ledger.en: volatility clustering: AC(1) of squared returns (ARCH effect), 20-day window

ledger.zh: 单位风险非流动性：Amihud非流动性除以已实现波动率
ledger.en: illiquidity-per-unit-risk: Amihud illiquidity divided by realised volatility

ledger.zh: 波动率均值回归：当日区间偏离其10日均值的反向信号
ledger.en: volatility mean-reversion: today's range deviation from its 10-day mean, sign-reversed

ledger.zh: 流动性贝塔：成交量对市场绝对收益的60日回归敏感度
ledger.en: liquidity beta: 60-day rolling sensitivity of volume to the market's absolute return

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 跳空-区间弹性：日内区间对隔夜跳空幅度的20日回归系数
ledger.en: gap-range elasticity: 20-day rolling regression of intraday range on overnight-gap size

versions.name: v3_optimized
versions.formula: rank, residualized vs x_0..x_7 reversal cluster (regression)

ledger.zh: 关注度转移趋势：行业相对成交量的10日变化
ledger.en: attention-shift trend: 10-day change in the industry-relative volume position

ledger.zh: 行业成交量分散度：组内成交量截面标准差(行业关注度分歧)
ledger.en: group volume dispersion: within-(day,g) cross-sectional std of volume (industry attention disagreement)

ledger.zh: 超调比率：单日收益相对当日区间的占比(方向性超调强度)
ledger.en: overshoot ratio: today's net return as a share of today's range (directional overshoot strength)

ledger.zh: 放量后反转：反转信号被前一日异常放量放大
ledger.en: reversal-after-volume-spike: reversal amplified when yesterday's volume was an outlier

ledger.zh: 带方向区间趋势：区间幅度乘以收益方向的5日均值
ledger.en: signed-range trend: 5-day mean of range magnitude times return direction

ledger.zh: 波动-非流动性联动：波动率排名与非流动性排名的乘积(双重风险共振)
ledger.en: vol-illiquidity regime: product of the volatility rank and the illiquidity rank (compounded-risk regime)

ledger.zh: 动量x效率：动量信号乘以趋势效率(仅在真趋势中放大动量)
ledger.en: momentum x efficiency: momentum scaled by trend efficiency (amplified only in genuine trends)

ledger.zh: 行业成交量目标编码：截至前一日的组内平均成交量(无泄漏)
ledger.en: group volume target-encoding: expanding (day,g) mean volume up to the previous day (leak-free)
